description: Smoke test the perspective module — produces a deliverable with a known weakness, then tests whether perspective catches it
usage: test perspective, verify lenses work, smoke test perspective, test lens

scenario.description: Which test scenario to run: quick (scenario 1 only), all (all 9 scenarios), a specific lens name (e.g. unsupported-confidence), a number (e.g. 8), or multi-pass/rotation for scenario 9
